text:
ercury in such a position, he will be clever, of sweet words
and proficient in arts; if it is Jupiter, he will be wealthy, religiously
inclined happy and honoured by kings; if it is Venus, he will be
very rich enjoying all the pleasures of senses: and if it is Saturn,
he will enjoy himself with others' wealth, clothes etc., will have
many activities and be a leader of men.
Another Yoga is based on the Moon's position in one of the
two halves of the zodiac according to the time of birth. If the
birth is at night and if the Moon is in the visible half of the
zodiac i.e. in one of the houses from the 7th to the 1st. the result
is very auspicious. Suppose the Moon is in the invisible half
for the same birth, it is very bed for the native. For a day
birth if the Moon is in the invisible half, she will bestow good
fortune. There is another yoga based on the position of benefics
in the Upacaya houses. I fall the four benefics. Moon. Mercury.

152 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
